targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(timestamp) AS time, level, count() AS count FROM project_sos.service_events WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND service = 'chat' GROUP BY time, level ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(timestamp) AS time, multiIf(message LIKE 'Client connected%', 'Connected', message LIKE 'Player disconnected%', 'Disconnected', 'Other') AS event_type, count() AS count FROM project_sos.service_events WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND service = 'chat' AND (message LIKE 'Client connected%' OR message LIKE 'Player disconnected%') GROUP BY time, event_type ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(timestamp) AS time, multiIf(message LIKE '%lobby auth%', 'Lobby Auth', message LIKE '%session auth%', 'Session Auth', 'Other') AS auth_type, count() AS count FROM project_sos.service_events WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND service = 'chat' AND (message LIKE '%lobby auth%' OR message LIKE '%session auth%') GROUP BY time, auth_type ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(timestamp) AS time, multiIf(message LIKE 'Session created%', 'Created', message LIKE 'Session ended%', 'Ended', 'Other') AS event_type, count() AS count FROM project_sos.service_events WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND service = 'chat' AND (message LIKE 'Session created%' OR message LIKE 'Session ended%') GROUP BY time, event_type ORDER BY time
SELECT toStartOfMinute(timestamp) AS time, channel, count() AS count FROM project_sos.chat_messages WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime GROUP BY time, channel ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(timestamp) AS time, multiIf(message LIKE '%rate limit%', 'Rate Limited', message LIKE '%Redis%' OR message LIKE '%redis%', 'Redis Error', 'Other') AS event_type, count() AS count FROM project_sos.service_events WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND service = 'chat' AND (message LIKE '%rate limit%' OR ((message LIKE '%Redis%' OR message LIKE '%redis%') AND level IN ('WARNING', 'ERROR'))) GROUP BY time, event_type ORDER BY time

SELECT toString(timestamp) AS time, level, category, message FROM project_sos.service_events WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND service = 'chat' AND category = 'Chat:Internal' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT toString(timestamp) AS time, level, category, message FROM project_sos.service_events WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND service = 'chat' AND level IN ('WARNING', 'ERROR') ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT toString(timestamp) AS time, channel, sender_name, session_id, content FROM project_sos.chat_messages WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 50
